revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. SEQUENCING ERROR ON BILL FLIP (multi_touch_patterns[0] and cherry_pick_moments[1]): The $250/month figure was not known at [01:44] — it was captured at [04:19]. Remove the $250 flip from the [01:44] empathy_miss coaching implication. Relocate the bill-flip coaching note to [04:19]-[04:22] where it is sequentially accurate. The empathy_miss at [01:44] should stand on its own merits (acknowledge vulnerability before technical reframe) without the anachronistic dollar figure.

2. SCHEMA REFERENCE CORRECTIONS: (a) cherry_pick_moments[2] (enthusiasm_signal): replace 'coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring' with 'context.ion_offerings_beyond_setter_call + analysis_directives.cross_sell_signal_detection.' (b) cherry_pick_moments[5] (conditional_booking): replace 'button_up' with 'analysis_directives.soft_outcome_distinction' and correct the classification from 'conditional_booking' to 'no_appointment / soft_callback.' The button_up protocol applies when an appointment exists; here no appointment was reached.

3. ADD THREE MISSED MOMENTS: (a) [03:08] — Tyke's partial roofing acknowledgment ('more than happy to kinda take a look at that with our every roof option') as a standalone cross_sell_partial_attempt moment contrasted against the schema template. (b) [03:49] — title/co-owner verify item correctly executed (confirms no spouse protocol was triggered and why). (c) [00:31] — Tyke's open 'what got you interested in solar?' question that unlocked James's 90-second disclosure, credited as a positive verify execution per schema verify.interest_in_solar. The current brief is tonally one-sided; these positive moments are required for a balanced coaching artifact.

4. TONE SOFTENING IN TWO PLACES: (a) trajectory_verdict: replace 'likely-ghost callback' with 'unlocked callback / low-probability follow-up' — 'ghost' is not grounded in James's behavior. (b) cherry_pick_moments[5] coaching_implication: replace 'the answer is zero' framing with a constructive teaching-moment frame consistent with the schema's coaching philosophy.
